# init(certificate:objectID:)

**Initializer**

Initializes a token keychain certificate with data from the specified certificate reference and a given object ID.

## Declaration

```swift
init?(certificate certificateRef: SecCertificate, objectID: TKToken.ObjectID)
```

## Parameters

- **certificateRef**: The certificate reference.

You can create a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Security/SecCertificate] value from a data object using the [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Security/SecCertificateCreateWithData(_:_:)] function.
- **objectID**: The object ID.

## Return Value

A new token keychain certificate.

## Discussion

This is the designated initializer.
